guidance.wrapperRole: Wrapper varies, so it teaches how Natural, Maduro, or Cameroon wrappers can change the same Fuente core.
guidance.binderRole: Dominican binder supports Fuente's smooth construction and balanced burn.
guidance.fillerRole: Dominican filler provides classic cedar, mild spice, and approachable premium structure.
guidance.avoidIf: User needs a single fixed flavor profile or wants strong nicotine intensity.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend as a classic Dominican premium that teaches construction and balance.

products.menuLine: Arturo Fuente Gran Reserva Rothschild · 4½ × 50 · Rothschild · Medium-Light · Dominican · $7 · Notes: cedar, baking spice, wood, light sweetness

guidance.wrapperRole: Connecticut Shade wrapper softens the profile with cream, light cedar, and a clean mild finish.
guidance.binderRole: Mexican binder adds structure and a quiet savory base without making the cigar aggressive.
guidance.fillerRole: Dominican and Mexican filler keep the smoke mild, consistent, and easy to read.
guidance.avoidIf: User wants bold pepper, heavy body, high nicotine, or collector rarity.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when the user needs a gentle, reliable, beginner-safe Connecticut profile.

products.menuLine: Macanudo Cafe Hyde Park · 5½ × 50 · Robusto · Light · Dominican · $8 · Notes: cream, cedar, light nuts, toast

guidance.wrapperRole: Ecuadorian Connecticut Shade wrapper delivers cream, smoothness, and light sweetness.
guidance.binderRole: Nicaraguan binder adds savory structure and keeps the mild profile from feeling thin.
guidance.fillerRole: Dominican and Nicaraguan long-fillers provide a creamy core with gentle spice and enough body for pairing.
guidance.avoidIf: User wants strong pepper, dark flavors, or short smoke.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend for a smooth, creamy premium cigar where the binder adds quiet savory depth.

products.menuLine: Montecristo White Series Toro · 6 × 54 · Toro · Medium-Light · Dominican · $11 · Notes: cream, cedar, light spice, toast

guidance.wrapperRole: Indonesian Shade wrapper brings approachable earth, toast, and a soft spice edge.
guidance.binderRole: Dominican binder keeps the blend steady and traditional rather than sharp.
guidance.fillerRole: Dominican filler gives cedar, earth, nuts, and mild-to-medium Cuban-heritage character.
guidance.avoidIf: User dislikes earthy profiles or wants creamy Connecticut sweetness.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when the user wants a classic, familiar Dominican profile with more character than ultra-mild cigars.

products.menuLine: Romeo y Julieta 1875 Churchill · 7 × 47 · Churchill · Medium · Dominican · $9 · Notes: cedar, earth, toasted nuts, light pepper

guidance.wrapperRole: Ecuadorian Sumatra wrapper (natural or maduro) frames the ligero core with spice, earth, and oily depth without softening the strength.
guidance.binderRole: Dominican binder supports combustion and structure through a dense double-ligero bunch.
guidance.fillerRole: Dominican ligero filler drives exceptional nicotine, red pepper, leather, coffee, and experienced-only intensity.
guidance.bestFor: Experienced smoker, after dinner, rum pairing, user wants a Dominican power lesson—not the mild DR stereotype.
guidance.avoidIf: Beginner, nicotine-sensitive, empty stomach, morning coffee, user wants creamy Connecticut mildness.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when the user seeks maximum Dominican ligero intensity and understands this is among the strongest profiles in the book.

products.menuLine: La Flor Dominicana Double Ligero Chisel · 6 × 54 · Chisel · Full · Dominican · $13 · Notes: red pepper, leather, charred oak, earth

guidance.wrapperRole: Nicaraguan Habano Oscuro wrapper deepens cocoa, leather, and pepper with oily maduro texture.
guidance.binderRole: Nicaraguan binder (often double-binder bunch) amplifies Garcia-family structure and full-bodied burn.
guidance.fillerRole: Nicaraguan filler drives espresso, dark cocoa, earth, cherry-dark fruit, and experienced-only intensity.
guidance.bestFor: Experienced smoker, winter smoke, after-dinner Scotch, user wants dark Nicaraguan Garcia body.
guidance.avoidIf: Beginner, mild preference, morning smoke, user dislikes pepper and heavy body.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend for a serious, dark, full-bodied Nicaraguan profile with My Father blending identity.

products.menuLine: My Father Le Bijou 1922 Toro · 6 × 52 · Toro · Full · Nicaragua · $13 · Notes: dark cocoa, espresso, leather, black pepper

guidance.wrapperRole: Ecuadorian Habano Sun Grown wrapper adds oily sweetness, spice, and Jalapa/Estelí character on the nose.
guidance.binderRole: Nicaraguan binder supports full body and ligero-forward structure.
guidance.fillerRole: Nicaraguan ligero filler delivers espresso, pepper, dark cocoa, and long-finishing strength.
guidance.bestFor: Experienced smoker, after dinner, bourbon pairing, user wants full Nicaraguan intensity with sweetness.
guidance.avoidIf: Beginner, empty stomach, short time window, user avoids high nicotine.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when the user asks for rich Nicaraguan power with sweetness and structure.

products.menuLine: Oliva Serie V Double Robusto · 6 × 54 · Double Robusto · Full · Nicaragua · $11 · Notes: sweet spice, espresso, dark cocoa, cedar

guidance.wrapperRole: Nicaraguan Habano natural or maduro wrapper sets cocoa/coffee tone and teaches wrapper-driven sweetness vs depth.
guidance.binderRole: Nicaraguan binder reinforces puro identity and rustic, honest Padron construction.
guidance.fillerRole: Nicaraguan filler drives cocoa, earth, coffee, and dependable medium body—the classic daily Padron profile.
guidance.bestFor: Quick lunch break, coffee pairing, Nicaraguan baseline lesson, value-conscious premium smoker.
guidance.avoidIf: Beginner nicotine-sensitive, user wants Dominican cream or anniversary-line collector rarity.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend as the reference Nicaraguan puro for balanced body without 1964/1926 pricing.
guidance.memberBlurb: The daily Padron lesson — all-Nicaraguan cocoa, coffee, and earth in honest construction. Natural vs maduro is your sweetness dial.

products.menuLine: Padron Thousands Series · 5½ × 50 · Robusto · Medium · Nicaragua · $9 · Notes: Cocoa, coffee, earth, nuts, cedar, light pepper, sweet tobacco.
